problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene may resolve What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
